name: Brick Cat chipi chapa
description: Brick Cat: Chipi Chapa – Retro arcade fun! Smash bricks with the dancing cat in this addictive challenge. Features: Classic brick-breaking action. Power-up with Multiballs for huge combos. Retro visuals & legendary cat energy. Global Leaderboard: Show your skills! SAVE YOUR SCORE after each game to join the Top 30. Enter your name, compete with players worldwide, and become the #1 champion. Can you beat the records? Play now and feel the chipi chapa vibe! Play More Games on ans32.com
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
